name: Applesauce Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix shortening with sugar and egg until creamy.
2. Combine applesauce with baking soda.
3. Add the rest of the ingredients to the mixture and combine well.
4. Drop spoonfuls about 2 inches apart onto a greased cookie sheet.
5. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
